title: Easy Night Vision
description: Gives Night Vision with a single button
body:
Gives Night Vision with a single button

One of the issues that the players complain about the most is the brightness, especially when you go down to the mine, it is a pain. To solve this brightness problem, you will either use a torch or a night vision potion and these will run out after a while. If you want to get rid of this difficulty, THIS MOD IS FOR YOU!

Press the 'N' key and the night vision effect will appear, you can change this key by going to Controls in Settings and changing it in the misc section.
